summary: Frontend-only verification of Smart Scheduler v2.0 dashboard targeting changes since iteration_1: CAPACITY tab in Hosts drawer, kcs badge in TopBar, /info-driven version+env badges, MOCK DATA badge, Sidebar regrouping (MONITORING/SCHEDULER/SYSTEM), Masakari/Migration removal, 60s health polling, 10-min stale-badge. All 14 review checkpoints verified via Playwright + screenshot. No JS errors during navigation across 9 routes; /migration is removed and does not crash.

issues: ~30 console warnings from Recharts ResponsiveContainer: 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' on initial mount (Overview vCPU bar chart, Pockets carousel, Metrics charts). Charts render correctly once parent is sized. Non-blocking. Suggest setting explicit minWidth/minHeight on ResponsiveContainer parents to silence.

verified_checklist.topbar.stale_badge: Updated <Xs ago>; amber threshold > 10 min per code
verified_checklist.sidebar.three_groups: MONITORING / SCHEDULER / SYSTEM rendered (verified via screenshot)
verified_checklist.sidebar.monitoring_items: Overview, Hosts, CPU Config, Pockets, Instances
verified_checklist.sidebar.scheduler_items: Flavor Visibility, Host Aggregator, VM Placement (NO Migration/Masakari)
verified_checklist.hosts_drawer.four_tabs: tab-summary, tab-vms, tab-cpu, tab-capacity all present and visible
verified_checklist.hosts_drawer.capacity_inputs: vCPUs + RAM inputs and check-capacity-btn confirmed in code (HostDrawer.jsx L188-220)
verified_checklist.routes: /, /hosts, /cpu-config, /pockets, /instances, /visibility, /aggregator, /placement, /metrics, /settings all load. /migration renders without crashing (no route match -> empty content area, layout intact)
verified_checklist.console_errors: 0 errors, only Recharts mounting warnings (~30, non-blocking)

action_items: OPTIONAL: Silence Recharts width/height -1 console warnings by setting minWidth/minHeight on ResponsiveContainer parents (carry-over from iter_1).

Note: /migration unmatched route currently shows blank content area (only layout). Spec says 'should not crash' which is satisfied; if a 404/redirect-to-/ is desired, add a catch-all <Route path='*' /> in App.js.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: TopBar correctly drives version+env from /info with fallback to context defaults; kcs badge gated on info?.kcs_connected !== undefined.
Good: HostDrawer Capacity tab uses api.getVMCapacity envelope ({data,isMock}) correctly and renders can_place / eligible_numa_nodes / best_numa_node / free_cpus_after / free_memory_mb_after.
Good: Sidebar groups defined declaratively (3 groups), Masakari fully removed, no orphan imports.
Good: TopBar health polling at 60s interval (line 68: setInterval(ping, 60_000)) matches spec.
Minor: TopBar manual refresh spinner uses fixed 700ms timeout rather than tying to actual refetch completion (carry-over from iter_1).
Minor: TopBar uses minutesAgo derivation (line 38) re-evaluated only on `now` tick (5s); fine for UX but stale-badge precision lags by up to 5s.

Minor: App.js has no catch-all route; unmatched paths like /migration render empty inner content. Layout (TopBar+Sidebar) still mounts so it doesn't crash, but a 404 page or redirect-to-/ would be cleaner UX.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App at https://openstack-dash.preview.emergentagent.com is fully mock (SKIP_LIVE=true; preview can't reach 10.232.80.241:31597 due to mixed-content). Iteration_2 verified: (a) version-badge=v0.2.1 from /info, (b) env-badge=ani_staging amber, (c) kcs badge green, (d) MOCK DATA badge visible, (e) 4 tabs in HostDrawer including new tab-capacity with check-capacity-btn returning can_place result, (f) Sidebar 3 groups MONITORING/SCHEDULER/SYSTEM with no Masakari/Migration, (g) /migration no longer routes (renders empty content area, no crash). Recharts mounting warnings remain non-blocking and identical to iter_1.
rca of the issue: No blocking issues found. All review checkpoints pass.
